project_type: React SPA with Vite bundler and Tailwind CSS
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` to confirm the app builds without errors. The app uses no test framework so build verification is the primary check.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. No test framework installed.
contribution_requirements: Single file app (src/App.jsx ~3122 lines). All logic lives in one component. Uses Tailwind for styling, lucide-react for icons.

key_patterns.state_management: useState hooks at component level, updateActiveWorkspace(updater) pattern for workspace mutations
key_patterns.node_data_model: { id, x, y, title, content, expanded, theme, groupId, status, priority, linkToTab, image }
key_patterns.history: takeSnapshot() before mutations for undo/redo support
key_patterns.layout: computeLayout() auto-adjusts group boundaries based on child positions
key_patterns.rendering: Canvas view (transform layer with absolute positioning) and Outline view (list-based)
key_patterns.node_creation: addNode(clientX, clientY, targetGroupId) creates node with nextId counter
key_patterns.context_menus: Right-click shows contextMenu (canvas bg), nodeContextMenu (per node), groupContextMenu (per group)
key_patterns.sidebar: Left sidebar with workspace list, view toggle (canvas/outline), stats, password protection

directory_structure: Single-page app: src/App.jsx is the entire application, src/index.css has Tailwind directives, src/main.jsx is React entry point. Package uses react, react-dom, lucide-react, vite, tailwindcss.
